items.title: Amazon Eliminates 100 White Collar Jobs In Robotics Team: Report
items.description: Amazon.com, Inc. has reportedly cut additional jobs in its robotics division. Robotics Unit Hit By Latest Layoffs Amazon has laid off employees in its robotics organization, Reuters reported on Wednesday, citing two people familiar with the matter. The team was responsible for building machines and automated systems used primarily in warehouse operations. The cuts reportedly affected at least 100 white-collar roles within the division.
